# Analytics & AI/ML Icons

## Analytics (`#8C4FFF`)

### resourceIcon (service-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.<resIcon>`
Required: `fillColor=#8C4FFF;strokeColor=#ffffff`

| Display Name | resIcon |
|---|---|
| Analytics | `analytics` |
| Athena | `athena` |
| CloudSearch | `cloudsearch2` |
| Clean Rooms | `clean_rooms` |
| Data Exchange | `data_exchange` |
| Data Pipeline | `data_pipeline` |
| DataZone | `datazone` |
| EMR | `emr` |
| Entity Resolution | `entity_resolution` |
| FinSpace | `finspace` |
| Glue | `glue` |
| Glue DataBrew | `glue_databrew` |
| Glue Elastic Views | `glue_elastic_views` |
| Kinesis | `kinesis` |
| Kinesis Data Analytics | `kinesis_data_analytics` |
| Data Firehose | `kinesis_data_firehose` |
| Kinesis Data Streams | `kinesis_data_streams` |
| Kinesis Video Streams | `kinesis_video_streams` |
| Lake Formation | `lake_formation` |
| Managed Service for Apache Flink | `managed_service_for_apache_flink` |
| Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka | `managed_streaming_for_kafka` |
| OpenSearch Service | `elasticsearch_service` |
| QuickSight | `quicksight` |
| Redshift | `redshift` |
| SageMaker | `sagemaker_2` |
| SQL Workbench | `sql_workbench` |

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.<shape>`
Required: `fillColor=#8C4FFF;strokeColor=none`

|---|---|

| HDFS Cluster | `cluster` |
| HDFS Cluster | `hdfs_cluster` |
| EMR Engine | `emr_engine` |
| Data Lake | `data_lake_resource_icon` |
| MSK Connect | `msk_amazon_msk_connect` |
| OpenSearch Cluster Admin Node | `opensearch_service_cluster_administrator_node` |
| OpenSearch Data Node | `opensearch_service_data_node` |
| OpenSearch Index | `opensearch_service_index` |
| OpenSearch Dashboards | `opensearch_dashboards` |
| OpenSearch Ingestion | `opensearch_ingestion` |
| OpenSearch Observability | `opensearch_observability` |
| OpenSearch Traces | `opensearch_service_traces` |
| OpenSearch UltraWarm Node | `opensearch_service_ultrawarm_node` |
| QuickSight Paginated Reports | `quicksight_paginated_reports` |
| Dense Compute Node | `dense_compute_node` |
| Dense Storage Node | `dense_storage_node` |
| Redshift RA3 | `redshift_ra3` |
| Redshift ML | `redshift_ml` |
| Redshift Streaming Ingestion | `redshift_streaming_ingestion` |
| Redshift Query Editor v2 | `redshift_query_editor_v20_light` |
| Data Exchange for APIs | `data_exchange_for_apis` |
| DataZone Business Data Catalog | `datazone_business_data_catalog` |
